description: Labeled backtest cases. Offline stand-in for two consecutive NPPES/CMS snapshots: the sample directory is the 'as-of-T' input, and 'truth' is what a later snapshot revealed actually changed. In production this file is generated automatically by diffing real historical snapshots (NBER NPPES mirror); the metric code in backtest.py is identical either way.
